reasoning: Over a 3-month horizon (late Oct 2025 to late Jan 2026), the expected total return is positive, driven by the risk-free rate and equity risk premium. KHC is a low-beta consumer staple with a relatively high dividend yield. We estimate the expected 3-month total return around +2%. Adjusting for at least one expected quarterly dividend ex-date (~1.6% yield on a $25 stock), the expected *price* return is slightly positive (+0.4%). With 3-month volatility around 10%, this translates to roughly a 52% probability that the closing price will be higher than the starting price.
